title: Breakfast at a Shop 早餐店

lines.en: Good morning, Tom. What do you want for breakfast?
lines.zh: 早上好，汤姆。你早饭想吃什么？

lines.en: I want some dumplings and soy milk, please.
lines.zh: 我想要一些包子和豆浆。

lines.en: Do you want steamed buns too?
No, thank you. I am not very hungry today.
lines.zh: 不了，谢谢。我今天不太饿。

lines.en: How about an egg? You need protein in the morning.
lines.zh: 来个鸡蛋怎么样？早上需要蛋白质。

lines.en: I will have rice porridge and a fried dough stick.
lines.zh: 我要一碗粥和一根油条。

lines.en: That smells so good! Can we eat here?
lines.zh: 闻起来好香！我们能在这里吃吗？

lines.en: Sure. Let us find a small table.
lines.zh: 当然。我们找张小桌子吧。

lines.en: This breakfast shop is the best!
